segments.text: When Jesus finished speaking he left Galilee and went to the region of Judea beyond the Jordan River.
Large crowds followed him, and he healed those who were sick there.
Some Pharisees came to test him. {
Is a man allowed to divorce his wife for any reason?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: they asked.
Jesus replied, {
Haven't you read that God who created people in the beginning made them male and female?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He said, ‘This is the reason a man will leave his father and mother, and join with his wife, and the two shall become one.’
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Now they're no longer two, but one. What God has joined together no one should separate.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then why did Moses give the command that a man could divorce his wife by giving her a written certificate of divorce, and sending her away?
segments.speaker: they

segments.text: they asked.
Because of your hard-hearted attitude Moses permitted you to divorce your wives, but it wasn't like that in the beginning,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied.
I tell you, anyone who divorces his wife except on the grounds of sexual immorality and then marries another woman, commits adultery.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If that's the situation between husband and wife, it's better not to marry!
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: his disciples told him.
Not everyone can accept this instruction,  only those it's given to,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus told them.
Some are born as eunuchs, some are made eunuchs by men, and some choose to be eunuchs for the sake of the kingdom of heaven. Those who can accept this should accept it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The people brought little children to him so he could bless them and pray for them. But the disciples told them not to.
But Jesus said, {
Let the little children come to me. Don't stop them. The kingdom of heaven belongs to those who are like them!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: He placed his hands on them to bless them, and then he left.
A man came to Jesus and asked him, {
Teacher, what good thing must I do to gain eternal life?
segments.speaker: man came to Jesus and

segments.text: Why do you ask me what is good?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus replied.
There's only one who is good. But if you want to have eternal life,  then keep the commandments.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Which ones?
segments.speaker: The man

segments.text: the man asked him.
Don't murder, don't commit adultery, don't steal, don't give false testimony,
segments.speaker: The man

segments.text: honor your father and mother, and love your neighbor as yourself,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: replied Jesus.
I've kept all these commandments,
segments.speaker: The young man

segments.text: the young man said.
What else do I need to do?
segments.speaker: The young man

segments.text: Jesus told him, {
If you want to be perfect,  then go and sell your possessions, give the money to the poor, and you'll have treasure in heaven. Then come and follow me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When the young man heard Jesus' answer he went away very sad, because he had many possessions.
I tell you the truth,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus said to his disciples,
rich people find it hard to enter the kingdom of heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I also tell you this: It's easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle than for a rich person to enter the kingdom of God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When the disciples heard this, they were very surprised, and asked, {
So who can be saved?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Jesus looked at them and said, {
From a human point of view it's impossible, but all things are possible with God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Peter answered him, {
Look, we've left everything and followed you. What reward will we have?
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Jesus replied, {
I tell you the truth: when everything is remade and the Son of man sits on his glorious throne, you who have followed me will also sit on twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: All those who because of me have left their homes, brothers, sisters, father, mother, children, and fields, will receive back a hundred times more, and will receive eternal life.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text:
For many who are first will be last, and many who are last will be first.
